root_cause_hypotheses: Wrapper/scheduler contract mismatch produced JSON/MD/status without canonical logs and without start/finish timestamps.
Monitor due-time logic likely used max-age/grace incorrectly and classified 06:20 as not_due despite 05:30 schedule.
Production scheduler execute-once path may have emitted reports without actually attempting production execution.
OPS delivery target alias remains unresolved; safe behavior is durable outbox queue with no default/home fallback.
OpenClaw post-capture ChromaDB inspection appears optional but was allowed to make overall job nonzero.
LinkedIn capture lacks model preflight and lets enrichment model error abort capture path.
title: Autonomous production execution recovery and dependency hardening
